summary: Guardian Family Dashboard (Phase 38) testing complete. All 22 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend fully verified: navigation to Safety Monitor, status cards with live data, map with location markers, alerts feed with severity badges, journey history, and Request Check-in functionality.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/guardian/dashboard/loved-ones returns monitored_users, seniors, total_loved_ones, active_journeys - VERIFIED
GET /api/guardian/dashboard/sessions returns active sessions with full location/risk data - VERIFIED
GET /api/guardian/dashboard/alerts returns alerts with severity badges and timestamps - VERIFIED
GET /api/guardian/dashboard/history returns completed sessions with duration/distance/alerts - VERIFIED
Security: Guardian only sees users who added them as contact (via guardian.email match) - VERIFIED
Security: 401 returned for unauthenticated requests - VERIFIED
Security: 404 returned for invalid/unauthorized session_id - VERIFIED
Frontend: Safety Monitor nav item in sidebar at /family/safety - VERIFIED
Frontend: Status card shows live data (location, speed, ETA, duration, risk level) - VERIFIED
Frontend: Live map renders with dark CartoDB tiles and user location markers - VERIFIED
Frontend: Alerts feed shows severity badges (high, medium, low) with icons - VERIFIED
Frontend: Journey History shows completed sessions with risk level badges - VERIFIED
Frontend: Request Check-in button triggers API and shows success toast - VERIFIED
Frontend: Refresh button refetches dashboard data - VERIFIED
data-testid attributes present: guardian-safety-dashboard, safety-live-map, alerts-feed, session-history, status-card-*, risk-badge-*, checkin-btn-*, safety-refresh-btn, nav-safety-monitor - VERIFIED
seed_data_creation: Used existing data: operator added guardian as contact, active guardian session exists
context_for_next_testing_agent: Guardian Family Dashboard at /family/safety. Login as guardian (Nagarik4parents@gmail.com). Operator (Aisha Sharma) has added this guardian as contact with relationship='parent'. Active sessions exist with risk levels. Alerts feed shows check_in_request, zone_risk, arrived, safety_confirmed alerts. Map uses CartoDB dark tiles. API endpoints under /api/guardian/dashboard/*. Request Check-in creates alert of type check_in_request.

mocked_apis.zone_cache: Zone risk data from in-memory cache

backend_api_tests: Authentication required for all dashboard endpoints (401 without token) - 5 tests
GET /loved-ones returns monitored_users with user details - PASSED
GET /loved-ones contains operator who added guardian as contact - PASSED
GET /loved-ones active_session contains required journey fields - PASSED
GET /sessions returns active sessions list - PASSED
GET /sessions contains all required monitoring fields - PASSED
GET /alerts contains required fields (severity, message, etc.) - PASSED
POST /request-check with invalid session returns 404 - PASSED
POST /request-check with valid session returns alert_id - PASSED
Security: Guardian only sees linked users - PASSED
Security: Guardian cannot access unlinked session - PASSED
Data integrity: total_loved_ones matches actual count - PASSED
Data integrity: active_journeys matches sessions count - PASSED
frontend_ui_tests: Guardian login with family tab - SUCCESS
Safety Monitor nav item visible - SUCCESS
Status card shows loved one with risk badge - SUCCESS
Live map renders with markers - SUCCESS
Success toast 'Safety check request sent' - SUCCESS

verified_features: Guardian can see monitored users (people who added them as contact)
Guardian can see seniors directly linked to their account
Live session data: location, speed, ETA, duration, risk level, zone name
Alert types: zone_risk, idle, emergency, arrived, route_deviation, safety_confirmed, check_in_request
Alert severity levels: low, medium, high, critical with visual badges
Journey history with max_risk_level, total_distance, alert_count
Request Check-in creates alert visible to both guardian and monitored user
Dark map tiles (CartoDB) with user location markers
